name: Animal Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal's farm (Mandatory)
		"animal_group_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal's animal group (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal (Mandatory)
		"facility_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal's facility (Optional)
		"pen_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal's pen (Optional)
		"origin_type": PartnerType, 		# Identifies the type of the origin, if any (Optional)
		"origin_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the origin which provided the animal, if any (Optional)
		"ag_origin_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal group that provided the animal (Optional)
		"fac_origin_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal group's facility (Optional)
		"cycle": int, 						# Which is the animal's cycle (Optional)
		"age": int, 						# Age of the animal (Optional)
		"gestation_days": int, 				# Number of days that the animal is in gestation (Optional)
		"input_date": datetime, 			# Date which the animal has been registered - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"birth_date": datetime, 			# Birth date of the animal - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"mating_date": datetime, 			# Mating date of the animal - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"name": str, 						# Name of the animal (Optional)
		"weight": float, 					# Weight of the animal (Optional)
		"value": float, 					# Value of the animal (Optional)
		"mother": str, 						# Identification regarding the animal's mother (Optional)
		"father": str, 						# Identification regarding the animal's father (Optional)
		"number_teats": int, 				# The animal's number of teats, if any (Optional)
		"number_teats_left": int, 			# The animal's number of left teats, if any (Optional)
		"number_teats_right": int, 			# The animal's number of right teats, if any (Optional)
		"invoice_number": str, 				# Number that identifies the invoice uniquelly (Optional)
		"invoice_value": float, 			# Value of the invoice (Optional)
		"animal_crossbreed_uuid": str, 		# UUID of the holding's animal crossbreed (Mandatory)
		"ag_output_uuid": str, 				# UUID of the animal group output that is associated with this animal's transaction (Optional)
		"note": str, 						# Note for additional information regarding the animal (Optional)
		"animal_type": AnimalType, 			# The animal's type (Mandatory)
		"animal_stage": AnimalStage, 		# The animal's stage (Mandatory)
		"animal_txn_type": AnimalTxnType, 	# An optional parameter determining which is the type of transaction related to the animal with standard being the default one (Optional)
		"animal_status": Status, 			# The animal's current status, if it is active or inactive (Optional)
		"gender": Gender, 	 		# Whether the gender of the animal is male or female (Optional)
		"mating_type": AnimalMatingType, 	# Which is the animal's process of mating (Optional)
		"is_continuous": bool, 				# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one (Optional)
		"is_origin_continuous": bool 		# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one at the origin (Optional)
	}
}

Animal Identity Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"animal_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal's identity event (Mandatory)
		"start_date": datetime, 			# When the animal received an identity - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"end_date": datetime, 				# When the animal stopped using that identity - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"id_value": str, 					# Which is the identity's value (Mandatory)
		"id_usage": int, 					# Stores how many times this ID has already been used (Optional)
		"id_priority": AnimalIdPriority, 	# Which is the priority associated with this identity (Optional)
		"id_equipment": AnimalIdEquipment, 	# Which is the type of equipment being used (Optional)
		"id_type": AnimalIdType,			# Which is the type of identity being registered (Mandatory)
		"status": Status					# Whether the identity is active or not (Mandatory)
	}
}

Animal Inspection Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the animal's farm (Mandatory)
		"animal_group_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal's animal group (Optional)
		"animal_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 									# Unique identifier of the animal's inspection event (Mandatory)
		"date": datetime, 								# When the animal was inspected - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"weight": float, 				      			# Weight of the inspected animal (Optional)
		"number_teats": int, 							# The animal's number of teats, if any (Optional)
		"number_teats_left": int, 						# The animal's number of left teats, if any (Optional)
		"number_teats_right": int, 						# The animal's number of right teats, if any (Optional)
        "loin_eye_area": float, 						# Measurement of the animal's loin eye area during inspection (Optional)
        "backfat_thickness": float, 					# Measurement of the animal's backfat thickness during inspection (Optional)
        "lean_meat_percentage": float,					# Measurement of the animal's lean meat percentage during inspection (Optional)
        "muscle_depth": float, 							# Measurement of the animal's muscle depth during inspection (Optional)
        "conformation_score": float, 					# Calculation of the animal's conformation score during inspection (Optional)
        "feed_intake": float, 							# Calculation of the animal's feed intake during inspection (Optional)
        "feed_conversion_ratio": float, 				# Calculation of the animal's feed conversion ratio during inspection (Optional)
		"employee_uuid": str, 		        			# Unique identifier of the employee that handled the inspection process (Optional)
		"loss_cause_uuid": str, 			    		# Unique identifier of the holding's loss cause that determines why the inspection has failed, if any (Optional)
		"note": str, 					    			# Note for additional information regarding the animal inspection (Optional)
        "inspection_status": AnimalInspectionStatus, 	# Status of the animal's inspection (Mandatory)
        "production_stage": ProductionStage, 			# Production stage in which the animal inspection is occuring (Optional)
        "is_continuous": bool 			     			# An optional flag determining if the animal group is a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of being a common one (Optional)
	}
}

Animal External Transfer Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 									# Unique identifier of the animal's farm (Mandatory)
		"animal_group_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal's animal group (Mandatory)
		"animal_uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the animal (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 										# Unique identifier of the animal's external transfer event (Mandatory)
		"fac_origin_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the origin's facility (Optional)
		"farm_destination_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the farm which will be provided with the animal (Mandatory)
		"ag_destination_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the destination's animal group (Optional)
		"fac_destination_uuid": str,						# Unique identifier of the destination's facility (Optional)
		"date": datetime, 									# When the animal received an external transfer process - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"weight": float, 									# Weight of the animal when it was transferred (Optional)
		"total_value": float, 								# Value associated with the transfer (Optional)
		"loss_cause_uuid": str, 							# UUID of the holding's loss cause (Optional)
		"note": str, 										# Note for additional information regarding the animal external transfer (Optional)
		"transfer_status": AnimalGroupExtTransferStatus, 	# The status of the external transfer, if its pending, rejected or approved (Optional)
		"is_continuous": bool, 								# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one (Optional)
		"is_dest_continuous": bool 							# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one at the destination (Optional)
	}
}

	"source_id": "ais",
	"source_version": "0.1.0",

	"data": {

schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal's farm (Mandatory)
		"animal_group_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal's animal group (Mandatory)
		"animal_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the animal's weaning event (Mandatory)
		"facility_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal's facility (Optional)
		"pen_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal's pen (Optional)
		"date": datetime, 							# When the animal's weaning process started - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"quantity": int, 							# How many offsprings were born (Mandatory)
		"average_off_age": float, 					# Average age of the weaned offsprings (Optional)
		"total_off_weight": float, 					# Total weight of all the weaned offsprings (Optional)
		"average_off_weight": float, 				# Average weight of all weaned offsprings (Optional)
		"ag_destination_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal group of the destination which received the weaned offsprings (Optional)
		"fac_destination_uuid": str,				# Unique identifier of the destination's facility (Optional)
		"animal_transfers_off": [{ 					# List of offspring transfers that are directly related to this weaning process (Optional)
			"animal_transfer_off_uuid": str, 		# Unique identifier of the animal's offspring transfer event (Mandatory)
			"off_txn_type": AnimalOffspringTxnType 	# Which was the action performed at this transfer, a donation or the reception of offsprings (Mandatory)
		}],
		"animal_parturition_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the parturition associated with the weaning process (Optional)
		"animal_nurse_mother_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal's nurse mother event, if any (Optional)
		"mating_group_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the mating group associated with the weaning process (Optional)
		"weight": float, 							# Weight of the animal when it went through the weaning process (Optional)
		"body_score": AnimalBodyScore, 				# The body condition score for the animal when it went through the weaning process (Optional)
		"weaning_type": AnimalWeaningType, 			# Which weaning type was observed on the process (Mandatory)
		"note": str, 								# Note for additional information regarding the animal weaning (Optional)
		"is_continuous": bool, 						# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one (Optional)
		"is_dest_continuous": bool 					# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one at the destination (Optional)
	}
}

name: Animal Group Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 						# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"farm_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal group's farm (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the animal group (Mandatory)
		"site_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal group's site (Optional)
		"ag_holdings": [{ 							# The list of holdings that are associated with the animal group (Optional) 
			"holding_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the holding (Mandatory)
			"account_uuid": str,					# Unique identifier of the holding's account (Optional)
			"regions": list[str],					# Unique identifiers of the holding's regions (Optional)
			"producers": list[str],					# Unique identifiers of the holding's producers (Optional)
			"technicians": list[str],				# Unique identifiers of the holding's technicians (Optional)
			"lead_technician_uuid": str, 			# Which is the animal group's supervising technician between all of its registered ones (Optional)
			"is_holder": bool 						# If the holding is the one that originated the animal group or not (Mandatory)
		}],
		"name": str, 								# Name of the animal group (Optional)
		"opening_date": datetime,					# When the animal group has been opened - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"closing_date": datetime, 					# When the animal group has been closed - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"input_prediction_date": datetime, 			# Prediction of when the animal group is going to receive an input process - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"input_prediction_quantity": int, 			# Prediction of the number of animals that the animal group is going to receive on an input process (Optional)
		"input_prediction_quantity_male": int, 		# Prediction of the number of male animals that the animal group is going to receive on an input process (Optional)
		"input_prediction_quantity_female": int,	# Prediction of the number of female animals that the animal group is going to receive on an input process (Optional)
		"output_prediction_date": datetime, 		# Prediction of when the animal group is going to receive an output process - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"technicians": list[str],					# List of veterinarian and assistant technicians responsible for the animal group (Optional)
		"animal_crossbreed_uuid": str, 				# UUID of the holding's animal crossbreed (Optional)
		"output_prediction_uuid": str, 				# UUID of the animal group's predicted output (Optional)
		"sequence_ag_uuid": str, 					# UUID of the sequence of animal groups that this animal group is associated to (Optional)

		"note": str, 						# Note for additional information regarding the animal group input (Optional)
		"gender": GroupGender, 	 			# Whether the gender of the animal's are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Mandatory)
		"ag_txn_type": AnimalGroupTxnType, 	# An optional parameter determining which is the type of transaction of the input with standard being the default one (Optional)
		"is_continuous": bool, 				# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one (Optional)
		"is_origin_continuous": bool 		# An optional flag determining if the origin is a continuous animal group or a common one (Optional)
	}
}

		"gta_number": str, 							# Number that identifies the GTA uniquelly (Optional)
		"farm_output_grp_uuid": str, 				# UUID of the farm's output group associated with this output (Optional)
		"ag_ext_transfer_uuid": str, 				# UUID of the external transfer associated with this output (Optional)
		"note": str, 								# Note for additional information regarding the animal group output (Optional)
		"gender": GroupGender, 	 					# Whether the gender of the animal's are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Optional)
		"ag_txn_type": AnimalGroupTxnType, 			# An optional parameter determining which is the type of transaction of the output with standard being the default one (Optional)
		"weight_type": FarmOutputGrpWeightType, 	# Determines which weight parameter was used at the output (Optional)
		"is_continuous": bool, 						# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one (Optional)
		"is_dest_continuous": bool 					# An optional flag determining if the destination is a continuous animal group or a common one (Optional)
	}
}

}

name: Animal Group Offspring Output Register
rawTitle: a. Animal Group Offspring Output Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal group's farm (Mandatory)
		"animal_group_uuid": str,			# Unique identifier of the animal group (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal group's offspring output event (Mandatory)
		"destination_type": PartnerType,	# Identifies the type of the destination, if any (Optional)
		"destination_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the destination which received the animals of the animal group, if any (Optional)
		"date": datetime, 					# When the animal group received an offspring output process - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"offspring_groups": [{ 				# List of offspring outputs per offspring group (Mandatory)
			"offspring_grp_uuid": str, 		# Unique identifier of the offspring group associated with the animals (Mandatory)
			"quantity": int, 				# Number of animals that were sent to this destination (Mandatory)
			"total_off_weight": float, 		# Total weight of all outputted offsprings (Optional)
			"average_off_weight": float 	# Average weight of all outputted offsprings (Optional)
		}],
		"total_weight": float, 				# Total animal weight of all of the outputted animals (Optional)
		"invoice_number": str, 				# Number that identifies the invoice uniquelly (Optional)
		"invoice_value": float, 			# Value of the invoice (Optional)
		"gta_number": str, 					# Number that identifies the GTA uniquelly (Optional)
		"animals": list[str], 				# UUID list of the animals that were outputted (Optional)
		"note": str, 						# Note for additional information regarding the animal offspring output (Optional)
		"ag_txn_type": AnimalGroupTxnType, 	# An optional parameter determining which is the type of transaction of the offspring output (Mandatory)
		"is_continuous": bool 				# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one (Optional)
	}
}

name: Animal Group Checklist Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 							# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"farm_uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the farm (Mandatory)
		"animal_group_uuid": str,						# Unique identifier of the animal group (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 									# Unique identifier of the animal group's checklist event (Mandatory)
		"name": str,									# Name of the checklist (Mandatory)
		"start_date": datetime, 						# When the checklist should start being valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"end_date": datetime, 							# When the checklist should stop being valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"inactivation_date": datetime, 					# When the checklist has been inactivated - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"recurrence_start_date": datetime, 				# When the checklist should start its recurrence - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"ref_start_days": int, 							# Used to determine the day that the checklist should be applied (Optional)
		"ref_end_days": int, 							# Used to determine the day of the deadline for the checklist's application (Optional)
		"ref_recurrence_days": int, 					# Used to determine the day that the checklist should be applied again (Optional)
		"is_restricted": bool, 							# If this checklist should have its management restricted to certain clients or not (Mandatory)
		"is_mandatory": bool, 							# If this checklist should be of mandatory application or not (Mandatory)
		"is_single_use": bool, 							# If this checklist should be applied at most once or not (Mandatory)
		"is_payment_relevant": bool, 					# If this checklist is relevant when calculating payment or not (Mandatory)
		"description": str, 							# An additional description for an animal group checklist (Optional)
		"original_uuid": str, 							# Can be used to overwrite an inherited checklist from the Animal Group's Farm (Optional)
		"locales": list[str], 							# Unique identifier of the checklist's locales where it should be applied (Optional)
		"locale_type": LocaleType, 						# Determines the locales' types (Optional)
		"status": Status,								# Whether the checklist is active or not (Mandatory)
		"checklist_type": ChecklistType, 				# Determines the type of the animal group checklist (Optional)
		"checklist_rule": ChecklistUsageRule, 			# Determines the usage rule of this animal group checklist (Optional)
		"checklist_recurrence": ChecklistRecurrence, 	# Determines the recurrence for the checklist's application, if any (Optional)
		"checklist_target": TechServiceTarget, 			# Which is the target of this checklist's application (Mandatory)
		"production_stages": list[ProductionStage], 	# Based on the species and production stages which the animal group checklist is associated with (Optional)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 		# Informs the production species which this Checklist applies to (Mandatory)
		"is_continuous": bool 							# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one (Optional)
	}
}

		"uuid": str, 									# Unique identifier of the animal group's checklist event (Mandatory)
		"name": str,									# Name of the checklist (Optional)
		"start_date": datetime, 						# When the checklist should start being valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"end_date": datetime, 							# When the checklist should stop being valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"inactivation_date": datetime, 					# When the checklist has been inactivated - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"recurrence_start_date": datetime, 				# When the checklist should start its recurrence - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"ref_start_days": int, 							# Used to determine the day that the checklist should be applied (Optional)
		"ref_end_days": int, 							# Used to determine the day of the deadline for the checklist's application (Optional)
		"ref_recurrence_days": int, 					# Used to determine the day that the checklist should be applied again (Optional)
		"is_restricted": bool, 							# If this checklist should have its management restricted to certain clients or not (Optional)
		"is_mandatory": bool, 							# If this checklist should be of mandatory application or not (Optional)
		"is_single_use": bool, 							# If this checklist should be applied at most once or not (Optional)
		"is_payment_relevant": bool, 					# If this checklist is relevant when calculating payment or not (Optional)
		"description": str, 							# An additional description for an animal group checklist (Optional)
		"original_uuid": str, 							# Can be used to overwrite an inherited checklist from the Animal Group's Farm (Optional)
		"locales": list[str], 							# Unique identifier of the checklist's locales where it should be applied (Optional)
		"locale_type": LocaleType, 						# Determines the locales' types (Optional)
		"status": Status,								# Whether the checklist is active or not (Optional)
		"checklist_type": ChecklistType, 				# Determines the type of the animal group checklist (Optional)
		"checklist_rule": ChecklistUsageRule, 			# Determines the usage rule of this animal group checklist (Optional)
		"checklist_recurrence": ChecklistRecurrence, 	# Determines the recurrence for the checklist's application, if any (Optional)
		"checklist_target": TechServiceTarget, 			# Which is the target of this checklist's application (Optional)
		"production_stages": list[ProductionStage], 	# Based on the species and production stages which the animal group checklist is associated with (Optional)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 		# Informs the production species which this Checklist applies to (Mandatory)
		"is_continuous": bool 							# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one (Optional)
	}
}

		"external_id": str, 						# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"farm_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the farm (Mandatory)
		"animal_group_uuid": str,					# Unique identifier of the animal group (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the animal group's sanitary incident event (Mandatory)
		"facility_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the facility where the sanitary incident occurred (Optional)
		"pen_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the pen where the sanitary incident occurred (Optional)
		"date": datetime, 							# When the sanitary incident occurred - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"total_exposed": int, 						# Number of animals exposed at the incident (Optional)
		"total_morbidity": int, 					# Number of animals affected by the incident (Optional)
		"total_mortality": int, 					# Number of animals that died due to the incident (Optional)
		"treatment_duration": int, 					# Number of days which will be needed for the incident's treatment (Optional)
		"note": str, 								# Note for additional information regarding the sanitary incident (Optional)
		"supplies": [{ 								# List of the supplies that were used at the sanitary treatment, if any (Optional)
			"supply_type": SupplyType, 				# Identifies the type of the supply (Mandatory)
			"supply_uuid": str 		   				# Unique identifier of the type of the supplies which the sanitary incident process is about (Mandatory)
		}],
		"attachments": [{ 							# List of links to our media service with data to corroborate with the reason for the sanitary incident (Optional)
			"file_uuid": str, 						# Unique UUID for the file over at the media storage (Mandatory)
			"name": str 							# The file's name for exhibition purpose (Optional)
		}],
		"technician_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the holding's technician associated with the sanitary incident creation (Optional)
		"loss_cause_uuid": str, 					# UUID of the holding's loss cause identified at the incident (Optional)
		"sanitary_diagnosis": SanitaryDiagnosis, 	# Which was the diagnosis for the incident (Optional)
		"is_continuous": bool 						# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one (Optional)
	}
}

name: Animal Group Key Performance Indicator Goal Register
rawTitle: a. Animal Group Key Performance Indicator Goal Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal group's farm (Mandatory)
		"animal_group_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal group (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the key performance indicator goal (Mandatory)
		"platform_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the KPI's platform (Optional)
		"kpi_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the platform's KPI which the goal refers to (Mandatory)
		"kpi_origin": KpiOrigin, 					# Which is the chosen KPI's origin (Mandatory)
		"thresholds": [{ 							# A list of thresholds for the goal that can be separated by day (Mandatory)
			"iteration": int, 						# Which is the iteration that this entry's set of parameters refers to (Optional)
			"value": float, 						# The KPI goal's target value (Mandatory)
			"min_threshold_ideal": float, 			# Minimum value of reference that serves as an inclusive threshold (<=) for the KPI's goal (Optional)
			"max_threshold_ideal": float, 			# Maximum value of reference that serves as an inclusive threshold (>=) for the KPI's goal (Optional)
			"variation": float 						# Percentage of variation for the target value (Mandatory)
		}],
		"original_uuid": str, 						# Can be used to overwrite an inherited KPI goal from the Animal Group's Farm (Optional)
		"status": Status,							# Whether the goal is active or not (Mandatory)
		"kpi_execution": KpiGoalExecution, 			# The execution with which the goal is configured (Mandatory) 
		"kpi_strategy": KpiGoalStrategy, 			# The strategy with which the goal is configured (Mandatory)
		"kpi_eval_rule": KpiGoalEvalRule, 			# The evaluation rule used for the KPI goal, if any (Optional)
		"kpi_target": InheritanceTarget, 			# Determines until which Entity the KPI goal shoul be inherited to (Mandatory)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 		# Based on the species and production stage which this KPI goal applies to (Optional)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 	# Informs the production species which this KPI goal applies to (Mandatory)
		"currency_unit": FarmCurrencyUnit, 			# The KPI goal's currency unit of usage, if any (Optional, mandatory if "unit_measurement" is not used)
		"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType 	# Annotation for an expected unit of measurement for the KPI goal, if any (Optional, mandatory if "currency_unit" is not used)
	}
}

	"source_id": "ais",
	"source_version": "0.1.0",
	"source_user": None,

	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": "f334606c-a588-49d5-8d6b-5c09def5a069",
		"animal_group_uuid": "cdacd200-6380-496b-922d-32522088e735",
		"uuid": "1338e582-60ea-40be-83f0-34d67c3a7415",
		"platform_uuid": "83e9dfa6-feee-43a9-b3fb-a9bdc410eac4",
		"kpi_uuid": "1e504292-6223-4614-b187-f6f3e46e2905",
		"kpi_origin": KpiOrigin.PLATFORM,
		"thresholds": [{
			"iteration": 1,
			"value": 10.0,
			"min_threshold_ideal": 7.5,
			"max_threshold_ideal": 12.5,
			"variation": 10.0
		}, {
			"iteration": 2,
			"value": 10.5,
			"min_threshold_ideal": 7.5,
			"max_threshold_ideal": 12.5,
			"variation": 10.0
		}],
		"original_uuid": "b69907c8-31a4-430b-8b2f-16336a79dc29",
		"status": Status.ACTIVE,
		"kpi_execution": KpiGoalExecution.DAILY,

name: Continuous Animal Group Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 					# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"farm_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal group's farm (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal group (Mandatory)
		"ag_holdings": [{ 						# The list of holdings that are associated with the animal group (Optional) 
			"holding_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the holding (Mandatory)
			"account_uuid": str,				# Unique identifier of the holding's account (Optional)
			"regions": list[str],				# Unique identifiers of the holding's regions (Optional)
			"producers": list[str],				# Unique identifiers of the holding's producers (Optional)
			"technicians": list[str],			# Unique identifiers of the holding's technicians (Optional)
			"lead_technician_uuid": str, 		# Which is the animal group's supervising technician between all of its registered ones (Optional)
			"is_holder": bool 					# If the holding is the one that originated the animal group or not (Mandatory)
		}],
		"name": str, 							# Name of the animal group (Optional)
		"technicians": list[str],				# List of veterinarian and assistant technicians responsible for the animal group (Optional)
		"lead_technician_uuid": str, 			# Which is the continuous animal group's supervising technician between all of its registered ones (Optional)
		"note": str, 							# Note for additional information regarding the animal group (Optional)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 	# Based on the species and production stage which are taken care of on the animal group (Mandatory)
		"continuous_ag_type": AnimalGroupRole 	# Type of the continuous animal group (Optional)
	}
}

		"supply_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the type of the supplies which the task is about (Optional)
		"quantity": float, 						# Quantity of supplies that was used on the task process (Optional)

		"task_type": TaskType,					# Which is the type of the task (Mandatory)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage 	# Based on the species and production stage which the task is associated with (Mandatory)
	}
}

name: Farm Threshold Reference Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the threshold reference's farm (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the threshold reference (Mandatory)
		"parameter": str, 							# Name of the parameter that the thresholds serve as reference (Mandatory)
		"min_threshold": any, 						# Minimum value of reference that serves as an inclusive threshold (<=) for the parameter (Optional, mandatory if "max_threshold" is not used)
		"max_threshold": any, 						# Maximum value of reference that serves as an inclusive threshold (>=) for the parameter (Optional, mandatory if "min_threshold" is not used)
		"min_threshold_ideal": any, 				# Minimum ideal value of reference (Optional)
		"max_threshold_ideal": any, 				# Maximum ideal value of reference (Optional)
		"original_uuid": str, 						# Can be used to overwrite an inherited threshold reference from the Farm's Platform (Optional)
		"threshold_rule": ThresholdReferenceRule, 	# Which is the rule that should be applied to this threshold reference when evaluating it (Mandatory)
		"event_set": EventSet, 						# Which event set this reference applies to (Mandatory)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 	# The production species which this threshold setting should be used for (Mandatory)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 		# The production stage which this threshold reference should be used for (Optional)
		"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType, 	# Annotation for an expected unit of measurement for the threshold reference (Optional)
		"inheritance_target": InheritanceTarget 	# The target for the inheritance of the threshold reference (Mandatory)
	}
}

Farm Checklist Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 							# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"farm_uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the farm (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 									# Unique identifier of the farm's checklist event (Mandatory)
		"name": str,									# Name of the checklist (Mandatory)
		"start_date": datetime, 						# When the checklist should start being valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"end_date": datetime, 							# When the checklist should stop being valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"inactivation_date": datetime, 					# When the checklist has been inactivated - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"recurrence_start_date": datetime, 				# When the checklist should start its recurrence - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"ref_start_days": int, 							# Used to determine the day that the checklist should be applied (Optional)
		"ref_end_days": int, 							# Used to determine the day of the deadline for the checklist's application (Optional)
		"ref_recurrence_days": int, 					# Used to determine the day that the checklist should be applied again (Optional)
		"is_restricted": bool, 							# If this checklist should have its management restricted to certain clients or not (Mandatory)
		"is_mandatory": bool, 							# If this checklist should be of mandatory application or not (Mandatory)
		"is_single_use": bool, 							# If this checklist should be applied at most once or not (Mandatory)
		"is_payment_relevant": bool, 					# If this checklist is relevant when calculating payment or not (Mandatory)
		"description": str, 							# An additional description for a farm checklist (Optional)
		"original_uuid": str, 							# Can be used to overwrite an inherited checklist from the Farm's Holding (Optional)
		"locales": list[str], 							# Unique identifier of the checklist's locales where it should be applied (Optional)
		"locale_type": LocaleType, 						# Determines the locales' types (Optional)
		"status": Status,								# Whether the checklist is active or not (Mandatory)
		"checklist_type": ChecklistType, 				# Determines the type of the farm checklist (Optional)
		"checklist_rule": ChecklistUsageRule, 			# Determines the usage rule of this farm checklist (Optional)
		"checklist_recurrence": ChecklistRecurrence, 	# Determines the recurrence for the checklist's application, if any (Optional)
		"checklist_target": TechServiceTarget, 			# Which is the target of this checklist's application (Mandatory)
		"production_stages": list[ProductionStage], 	# Based on the species and production stages which the farm checklist is associated with (Optional)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies 		# Informs the production species which this Checklist applies to (Mandatory)
	}
}

		"is_restricted": bool, 							# If this checklist should have its management restricted to certain clients or not (Optional)
		"is_mandatory": bool, 							# If this checklist should be of mandatory application or not (Optional)
		"is_single_use": bool, 							# If this checklist should be applied at most once or not (Optional)
		"is_payment_relevant": bool, 					# If this checklist is relevant when calculating payment or not (Optional)
		"description": str, 							# An additional description for a farm checklist (Optional)
		"original_uuid": str, 							# Can be used to overwrite an inherited checklist from the Farm's Holding (Optional)
		"locales": list[str], 							# Unique identifier of the checklist's locales where it should be applied (Optional)
		"locale_type": LocaleType, 						# Determines the locales' types (Optional)
		"status": Status,								# Whether the checklist is active or not (Optional)
		"checklist_type": ChecklistType, 				# Determines the type of the farm checklist (Optional)
		"checklist_rule": ChecklistUsageRule, 			# Determines the usage rule of this farm checklist (Optional)
		"checklist_recurrence": ChecklistRecurrence, 	# Determines the recurrence for the checklist's application, if any (Optional)
		"checklist_target": TechServiceTarget, 			# Which is the target of this checklist's application (Optional)
		"production_stages": list[ProductionStage], 	# Based on the species and production stages which the farm checklist is associated with (Optional)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies 		# Informs the production species which this Checklist applies to (Optional)
	}
}

schema:

		"final_ref": str, 							# Name of the parameter that the blocking rule uses as a final reference (Optional, mandatory if "initial_ref" is not used)

		"additional_attributes": [{ 				# List of additional attributes that may be used to further select which entries the rule will be applied to (Optional)
			"key": str, 							# The unique identifier of the additional attribute (Mandatory)

		}],
		"original_uuid": str, 						# Can be used to overwrite an inherited blocking rule from the Farm's Holding (Optional)

		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 		# The production stage which this blocking rule should be used for (Optional)
		"status": Status							# Whether the blocking rule is active or not (Mandatory)
	}
}

schema:

		"kpi_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the platform's KPI which the goal refers to (Mandatory)
		"kpi_origin": KpiOrigin, 					# Which is the chosen KPI's origin (Mandatory)
		"thresholds": [{ 							# A list of thresholds for the goal that can be separated by day (Mandatory)
			"iteration": int, 						# Which is the iteration that this entry's set of parameters refers to (Optional)
			"value": float, 						# The KPI goal's target value (Mandatory)
			"min_threshold_ideal": float,			# Minimum value of reference that serves as an inclusive threshold (<=) for the KPI's goal (Optional)
			"max_threshold_ideal": float, 			# Maximum value of reference that serves as an inclusive threshold (>=) for the KPI's goal (Optional)
			"variation": float 						# Percentage of variation for the target value (Optional)
		}],
		"original_uuid": str, 						# Can be used to overwrite an inherited KPI goal from the Farm's Holding (Optional)
		"status": Status,							# Whether the goal is active or not (Mandatory)
		"kpi_execution": KpiGoalExecution,			# The execution with which the goal is configured (Mandatory) 
		"kpi_strategy": KpiGoalStrategy, 			# The strategy with which the goal is configured (Mandatory)
		"kpi_eval_rule": KpiGoalEvalRule, 			# The evaluation rule used for the KPI goal, if any (Optional)
		"kpi_target": InheritanceTarget, 			# Determines until which Entity the KPI goal shoul be inherited to (Mandatory)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 		# Based on the species and production stage which this KPI goal applies to (Optional)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 	# Informs the production species which this KPI goal applies to (Mandatory)
		"currency_unit": FarmCurrencyUnit, 			# The KPI goal's currency unit of usage, if any (Optional, mandatory if "unit_measurement" is not used)

	}
}

Farm Output Group Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the farm (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the farm's output group event (Mandatory)
		"ag_outputs": [{ 						# The list of animal group outputs with at least two that make up the output group (Optional) 
			"animal_group_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal group (Mandatory)
			"ag_output_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal group's output event (Mandatory)
			"is_continuous": bool 				# An optional flag determining if the output is saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of being at the common one (Optional)
		}],
		"animal_outputs": [{ 					# The list of animal outputs with at least two that make up the output group (Optional) 
			"animal_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal (Mandatory)
			"animal_output_uuid": str 			# Unique identifier of the animal's output event (Mandatory)
		}],
		"date": datetime, 						# When the output group occurred - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"quantity": int, 						# Number of animals that the farm gave on the output group process (Optional)
		"total_weight": float, 					# Total animal weight of the outputted group of animals (Optional)
		"average_weight": float, 				# Average animal weight of the outputted group of animals (Optional)
		"invoice_number": str, 					# Number that identifies the invoice uniquelly (Optional)
		"invoice_value": float, 				# Total value of the invoice (Optional)
		"note": str, 							# Note for additional information regarding the output group (Optional)
		"weight_type": FarmOutputGrpWeightType 	# Determines which weight parameter was used at the output group (Optional)
	}
}

schema:

		"service_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the technician's service that was created from this request (Optional)

			"file_uuid": str, 					# Unique UUID for the file over at the media storage (Mandatory)

		}],
		"request_status": TechRequestStatus, 	# The current status of this request (Mandatory)
		"request_urgency": TechRequestUrgency 	# The urgency of this request (Mandatory)
	}
}

		"rejection_date": datetime, 			# When the advisory was rejected - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)

		"external_id": str, 								# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"holding_uuid": str,								# Unique identifier of the vaccine type's holding (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str,										# Unique identifier of the vaccine type (Mandatory)
		"name": str,										# Name of the vaccine type (Mandatory)
		"code": str, 										# A code used by third party services (Optional)
		"withdrawal_period": int, 							# A withdrawal period in which the vaccine type should be used (Optional)
		"dosage": str, 										# How the vaccine type should be dosed when used (Optional)
		"official_register": str, 							# An official register for the vaccine type within the government (Optional)
		"is_applicable": bool, 								# A flag determining if the vaccine is applicable to a herd of animals or not (Optional)
		"status": Status,									# Whether the vaccine type is active or not (Mandatory)
		"vaccine_group": SupplyVaccineGroup, 				# Which is the group of the vaccine type (Mandatory)
		"administration_route": SupplyAdministrationRoute, 	# Which is the administration route of the vaccine (Mandatory)
		"production_stages": list[ProductionStage] 			# List of the production stages which this vaccine type applies to (Optional)
	}
}

Holding Consumption Schedule Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 								# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"holding_uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the consumption schedule's holding (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 										# Unique identifier of the consumption schedule (Mandatory)
		"supply_type": SupplyType, 							# Identifies the type of the supply (Mandatory)
		"schedule": [{ 										# A list of schedules that can be separated by day, week, etc. (Mandatory)
			"supply_group": ( 								# Which is the group of the supply type (Optional)
				SupplyFeedGroup
				| SupplyMedicineGroup
				| SupplyVaccineGroup
				| SupplyDisinfectantGroup
				| SupplyMaterialGroup
			),
			"supplies": list[str], 							# Unique identifiers of the types of supplies which the consumption schedule process is about (Optional)
			"iteration": int, 								# Which is the iteration that this entry's set of parameters refers to (Mandatory)
			"iteration_size": int, 							# Which is the iteration's size that is used to determine until when its usage should be extended (Mandatory)
			"consumption_size": int, 						# How much of the iteration's window is gonna be used for consumption (Mandatory)
			"restriction_size": int, 						# How much of the iteration's window is gonna be used for restriction of consumption (Mandatory)		
			"consumption_per_capita": float,	 			# How much each animal will consume per iteration considering the schedule (Optional)
			"total_cns_per_capita": float, 					# How much each animal will consume in total considering the schedule (Optional)
			"increment_per_capita": float, 					# How much the supply will be incremented for consumption per iteration and animal (Optional)
			"total_inc_per_capita": float, 					# How much the supply will be incremented in total for consumption per animal (Optional)
			"total_acc_per_capita": float, 					# How much each animal will consume in total considering all iterations of this schedule (Optional)
			"average_weight": float, 						# Average animal weight used as a reference (Optional)
			"average_daily_weight_gain": float 				# Average animal weight gain per day used as a reference (Optional)
		}],
		"validity_date": datetime, 							# When the consumption schedule is gonna be considered valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"animal_crossbreed_uuid": str, 						# UUID of the animal crossbreed which the consumption schedule process is about (Optional)
		"sch_execution": HoldingConsumptionSchExecution, 	# The execution with which the schedule is configured (Mandatory) 
		"production_stage": ProductionStage 				# Based on the species and production stage which the holding consumption schedule is associated with (Mandatory)
	}
}

Holding Checklist Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 							# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"holding_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the checklist's holding (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str,									# Unique identifier of the checklist (Mandatory)
		"name": str,									# Name of the checklist (Mandatory)
		"start_date": datetime, 						# When the checklist should start being valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"end_date": datetime, 							# When the checklist should stop being valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"inactivation_date": datetime, 					# When the checklist has been inactivated - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"recurrence_start_date": datetime, 				# When the checklist should start its recurrence - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"ref_start_days": int, 							# Used to determine the day that the checklist should be applied (Optional)
		"ref_end_days": int, 							# Used to determine the day of the deadline for the checklist's application (Optional)
		"ref_recurrence_days": int, 					# Used to determine the day that the checklist should be applied again (Optional)
		"is_restricted": bool, 							# If this checklist should have its management restricted to certain clients or not (Mandatory)
		"is_mandatory": bool, 							# If this checklist should be of mandatory application or not (Mandatory)
		"is_single_use": bool, 							# If this checklist should be applied at most once or not (Mandatory)
		"is_payment_relevant": bool, 					# If this checklist is relevant when calculating payment or not (Mandatory)
		"description": str, 							# An additional description for a holding checklist (Optional)
		"locales": list[str], 							# Unique identifier of the checklist's locales where it should be applied (Optional)
		"locale_type": LocaleType, 						# Determines the locales' types (Optional)
		"status": Status,								# Whether the checklist is active or not (Mandatory)
		"checklist_type": ChecklistType, 				# Determines the type of the holding checklist (Optional)
		"checklist_rule": ChecklistUsageRule, 			# Determines the usage rule of this holding checklist (Optional)
		"checklist_recurrence": ChecklistRecurrence, 	# Determines the recurrence for the checklist's application, if any (Optional)
		"checklist_target": TechServiceTarget, 			# Which is the target of this checklist's application (Mandatory)
		"production_systems": list[ProductionSystem], 	# Informs the production system regarding species and production stages which the checklist os applied to (Optional)
		"production_stages": list[ProductionStage], 	# Based on the species and production stages which the holding checklist is associated with (Optional)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies 		# Informs the production species which this Checklist applies to (Mandatory)
	}
}

schema:
{
	"data": {
		"holding_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the blocking rule's holding (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str,								# Unique identifier of the blocking rule (Mandatory)
		"initial_ref": str, 						# Name of the parameter that the blocking rule uses as an initial reference (Optional, mandatory if "final_ref" is not used)
		"initial_days": int, 						# Minimum value of reference that is used to calculate an inclusive threshold (>=) for the rule (Optional, mandatory if "max_threshold" is not used)
		"final_ref": str, 							# Name of the parameter that the blocking rule uses as a final reference (Optional, mandatory if "initial_ref" is not used)
		"final_days": int, 							# Maximum value of reference that is used to calculate an inclusive threshold (<=) for the rule (Optional, mandatory if "initial_days" is not used)
		"additional_attributes": [{ 				# List of additional attributes that may be used to further select which entries the rule will be applied to (Optional)
			"key": str, 							# The unique identifier of the additional attribute (Mandatory)
			"value": any 							# The value of the additional attribute (Mandatory)
		}],
		"event_set": EventSet, 						# Which event set this blocking rule applies to (Mandatory)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 	# The production species which this blocking rule should be used for (Mandatory)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 		# The production stage which this blocking rule should be used for (Optional)
		"status": Status							# Whether the blocking rule is active or not (Mandatory)
	}
}

schema:
{
	"data": {
		"holding_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the score rule's holding (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str,								# Unique identifier of the score rule (Mandatory)
		"name": str, 								# Name of the score rule (Mandatory)
		"start_date": datetime,						# When the score rule starts being valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"end_date": datetime,						# When the score rule stops being valid - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"axis": KpiGroup, 							# Which is the KPI group associated with the axis for this score rule (Mandatory)
		"thresholds": [{ 							# List of minimum and maximum thresholds to determine how to evaluate this rule (Mandatory)
			"min_threshold": float, 				# The minimum value for the score (Optional)
			"max_threshold": float, 				# The maximum value for the score (Optional)
			"score": float 							# The score associated with the interval between the chosen thresholds (Mandatory)
		}],
		"score_weight": float, 						# Weight associated with the score, if any (Optional)
		"kpi_uuid": str,	 						# Unique identifier of the KPI associated with this score rule (Mandatory)
		"kpi_origin": KpiOrigin, 					# Which is the chosen KPI's origin (Mandatory)
		"prd_stage_group": ProductionStageGroup 	# Which is the production stage group associated with this score rule (Mandatory)
	}
}
example:
{
	"source_id": "ais",
	"source_version": "0.1.0",
	"source_user": None,
	"type": EventType.H_SCORE_RULE_REGISTER,
	"version": "1.0",
	"data": {
		"holding_uuid": "aa03455f-9172-4dea-88fe-f2af435c861e",
		"uuid": "b29280be-d87a-42b1-8d8e-e8b8520df064",
		"name": "Score Rule One",
		"start_date": "2025-01-01 03:00:00.000000+00:00",
		"end_date": "2025-01-31 03:00:00.000000+00:00",
		"axis": KpiGroup.METHOD,
		"thresholds": [{
			"min_threshold": 50.0,
			"max_threshold": 75.0,

			"min_threshold_ideal": float, 			# Minimum value of reference that serves as an inclusive threshold (<=) for the KPI's goal (Optional)
			"max_threshold_ideal": float, 			# Maximum value of reference that serves as an inclusive threshold (>=) for the KPI's goal (Optional)
			"variation": float 						# Percentage of variation for the target value (Mandatory)
		}],
		"original_uuid": str, 						# Can be used to overwrite an inherited KPI goal from the Holding's Platform (Optional)
		"status": Status,							# Whether the goal is active or not (Mandatory)
		"kpi_execution": KpiGoalExecution, 			# The execution with which the goal is configured (Mandatory)

		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 		# Based on the species and production stage which this KPI goal applies to (Optional)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 	# Informs the production species which this KPI goal applies to (Mandatory)
		"currency_unit": FarmCurrencyUnit, 			# The KPI goal's currency unit of usage, if any (Optional, mandatory if "unit_measurement" is not used)
		"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType 	# Annotation for an expected unit of measurement for the KPI goal, if any (Optional, mandatory if "currency_unit" is not used)
	}
}

name: Log Regarding a Threshold Evaluation Register
rawTitle: a. Log Regarding a Threshold Evaluation Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the threshold evaluation log's farm (Mandatory)
		"animal_group_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the threshold evaluation log's animal group, if any (Optional)
		"uuid": str, 									# Unique identifier of the threshold evaluation log (Mandatory)
		"date": datetime, 								# When the threshold evaluation was identified - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"value": float, 								# Which is the observed value that was outside of the expected considering the referred threshold (Mandatory)
		"observation_start": datetime, 					# When the observation started - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"observation_end": datetime, 					# When the  observation ended - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"min_threshold": float, 						# Minimum value of reference of the observation (Optional, mandatory if "max_threshold" is not used)
		"max_threshold": float, 						# Maximum value of reference of the observation (Optional, mandatory if "min_threshold" is not used)
		"threshold_start": datetime, 					# The start date of the window of the observed value - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"threshold_end": datetime, 						# The end date of the window of the observed value - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"threshold_origin": { 							# Used when the observed threshold's unit of measurement is different from this logs' own unit (Optional)
			"min_threshold": float, 					# Minimum value of reference of the original threshold (Optional)
			"max_threshold": float, 					# Maximum value of reference of the original threshold (Optional)
			"threshold_metric": LogThreshMetric, 	 	# Which is the threshold metric associated with the original threshold (Optional)
			"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType 	# Which is the unit of measurement associated with the original threshold (Mandatory)
		},
		"threshold_evl_type": LogThreshEvlType, 		# Which is the threshold evaluation type associated with this log (Mandatory)
		"observation_state": LogObservationState, 		# Which is the state of the observed value regarding the threshold, above the expected, below or within (Mandatory)
		"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType 		# Which is the unit of measurement associated with this threshold evaluation (Mandatory)
	}
}
example:
{
	"source_id": "barn",
	"source_version": "0.1.0",
	"source_user": None,
	"type": EventType.LOG_THRESH_EVL_REGISTER,
	"version": "1.0",
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": "f334606c-a588-49d5-8d6b-5c09def5a069",
		"animal_group_uuid": "cdacd200-6380-496b-922d-32522088e735",
		"uuid": "b402f621-14e7-44ae-ac43-5b7227fa4192",
		"date": "2025-01-01 03:00:00.000000+00:00",
		"value": 10.0,
		"observation_start": "2025-01-01 00:00:00.000000+00:00",
		"observation_end": "2025-01-01 06:00:00.000000+00:00",
		"min_threshold": 0.0,
		"max_threshold": 4.0,
		"threshold_start": "2025-01-01 00:00:00.000000+00:00",
		"threshold_end": "2025-01-01 06:00:00.000000+00:00",
		"threshold_origin": {
			"min_threshold": 0.0,
			"max_threshold": 5.0,
			"threshold_metric": LogThreshMetric.REBREEDING,
			"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType.PERCENTAGE
		},
		"threshold_evl_type": LogThreshEvlType.REBREEDING_RATE,
		"observation_state": LogObservationState.ABOVE,
		"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType.NOT_DEFINED
	},
	"created_at": "2025-01-01 03:00:00.000000+00:00"
}

name: Log Regarding a Group Threshold Evaluation Register
rawTitle: a. Log Regarding a Group Threshold Evaluation Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 									# Unique identifier of the group threshold evaluation log's farm (Mandatory)
		"animal_group_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the group threshold evaluation log's animal group, if any (Optional)
		"uuid": str, 										# Unique identifier of the group threshold evaluation log (Mandatory)
		"date": datetime, 									# When the group threshold evaluation was identified - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"total_targets": int, 								# Total number of targets that were observed (Mandatory)
		"total_targets_in_state": int, 						# Total number of targets that are inside the determined state that were observed (Mandatory)
		"observation_start": datetime, 						# When the observation started - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"observation_end": datetime, 						# When the  observation ended - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"min_threshold": float, 							# Minimum value of reference of the observation (Optional, mandatory if "max_threshold" is not used)
		"max_threshold": float, 							# Maximum value of reference of the observation (Optional, mandatory if "min_threshold" is not used)
		"threshold_start": datetime, 						# The start date of the window of the observed value - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"threshold_end": datetime, 							# The end date of the window of the observed value - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"targets_stats": [{									# Set of statistics related to the observed targets (Optional)
			"stats_name": LogStatsName, 					# Name of the value related to the distribution (Mandatory)
			"stats_value": float 							# Value related to the distribution (Mandatory)
		}],
		"targets_in_state_stats": [{ 						# Set of statistics related to the observed targets that are inside the determined state (Optional)
			"stats_name": LogStatsName, 					# Name of the value related to the distribution (Mandatory)
			"stats_value": float 							# Value related to the distribution (Mandatory)
		}],
		"threshold_origin": { 								# Used when the observed threshold's unit of measurement is different from this logs' own unit (Optional)
			"min_threshold": float, 						# Minimum value of reference of the original threshold (Optional)
			"max_threshold": float, 						# Maximum value of reference of the original threshold (Optional)
			"threshold_metric": LogThreshMetric, 	 		# Which is the threshold metric associated with the original threshold (Optional)
			"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType 		# Which is the unit of measurement associated with the original threshold (Mandatory)
		},
		"group_thresh_evl_type": LogGroupThreshEvlType, 	# Which is the group threshold evaluation type associated with this log (Mandatory)
		"observation_state": LogObservationState, 			# Which is the state of the observed value regarding the threshold, above the expected, below or within (Mandatory)
		"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType, 			# Which is the unit of measurement associated with this group threshold evaluation (Mandatory)

name: Platform Key Performance Indicator Goal Register
rawTitle: a. Platform Key Performance Indicator Goal Register
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"platform_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the key performance indicator goal's platform (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the key performance indicator goal (Mandatory)
		"kpi_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the platform's KPI which the goal refers to (Mandatory)
		"thresholds": [{ 							# A list of thresholds for the goal that can be separated by day (Mandatory)
			"iteration": int, 						# Which is the iteration that this entry's set of parameters refers to (Optional)
			"value": float, 						# The KPI goal's target value (Mandatory)
			"min_threshold_ideal": float,			# Minimum value of reference that serves as an inclusive threshold (<=) for the KPI's goal (Optional, mandatory if "max_threshold_ideal" is not used)
			"max_threshold_ideal": float, 			# Maximum value of reference that serves as an inclusive threshold (>=) for the KPI's goal (Optional, mandatory if "min_threshold_ideal" is not used)
			"variation": float 						# Percentage of variation for the target value (Optional)
		}],
		"status": Status,							# Whether the goal is active or not (Mandatory)
		"kpi_execution": KpiGoalExecution, 			# The execution with which the goal is configured (Mandatory) 
		"kpi_strategy": KpiGoalStrategy,			# The strategy with which the goal is configured (Mandatory)
		"kpi_eval_rule": KpiGoalEvalRule, 			# The evaluation rule used for the KPI goal, if any (Optional)
		"kpi_target": InheritanceTarget, 			# Determines until which Entity the KPI goal shoul be inherited to (Mandatory)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 		# Based on the species and production stage which this KPI goal applies to (Optional)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 	# Informs the production species which this KPI goal applies to (Mandatory)
		"currency_unit": FarmCurrencyUnit, 			# The KPI goal's currency unit of usage, if any (Optional, mandatory if "unit_measurement" is not used)
		"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType 	# Annotation for an expected unit of measurement for the KPI goal, if any (Optional, mandatory if "currency_unit" is not used)
	}
}
example:
{
	"source_id": "ais",
	"source_version": "0.1.0",
	"source_user": None,
	"type": EventType.P_KPI_GOAL_REGISTER,
	"version": "1.0",
	"data": {
		"platform_uuid": "83e9dfa6-feee-43a9-b3fb-a9bdc410eac4",
		"uuid": "b69907c8-31a4-430b-8b2f-16336a79dc29",
		"kpi_uuid": "1e504292-6223-4614-b187-f6f3e46e2905",
		"thresholds": [{
			"iteration": 1,
			"value": 10.0,
			"min_threshold_ideal": 7.5,
			"max_threshold_ideal": 12.5,
			"variation": 10.0
		}, {
			"iteration": 2,
			"value": 10.5,
			"min_threshold_ideal": 7.5,
			"max_threshold_ideal": 12.5,
			"variation": 10.0
		}],
		"status": Status.ACTIVE,
		"kpi_execution": KpiGoalExecution.DAILY,
		"kpi_strategy": KpiGoalStrategy.MIN_AND_MAX,
		"kpi_eval_rule": KpiGoalEvalRule.SCALE_BAD_GOOD,
		"kpi_target": InheritanceTarget.HOLDING,
		"production_stage": ProductionStage.NURSERY,

name: Supply Consumption Update
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 					# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"farm_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the farm (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the farm's supply consumption event (Mandatory)
		"facility_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal group's facility (Optional)
		"pen_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal group's pen (Optional)
		"supply_type": SupplyType, 				# Identifies the type of the supply (Optional)
		"supply_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the type of the supplies which the supply consumption process is about (Optional)
		"start_date": datetime, 				# When the animal group's supply consumption process started - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"end_date": datetime, 					# When the animal group's supply consumption process ended - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"quantity": float, 						# Quantity of supplies that the farm gave on the supply consumption process (Optional)
		"daily_reg_qty_per_capita": float, 		# Regular quantity of supply consumed daily per animal (Optional)
		"daily_add_qty_per_capita": float, 		# Additional quantity of supply consumed daily per animal (Optional)
		"reg_cns_days": int, 					# Number of days of regular consumption (Optional)
		"add_cns_days": int, 					# Number of days of additional consumption (Optional)
		"number_animals": int, 					# The number of animals related to the consumption of these supplies (Optional)
		"average_weight": float, 				# Average animal weight of the animals related to the consumption of these supplies (Optional)
		"animal_consumptions": [{ 				# List of consumptions per animal (Optional)
			"animal_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal (Mandatory)
			"quantity": float, 					# Quantity of supplies that the animal consumed (Mandatory)
			"additional_attributes": dict 		# List of additional attributes over a single level dictionary (Optional)
		}],
		"batch_information": str, 				# Information regarding the batch that produced the supplies (Optional)
		"note": str, 							# Note for additional information regarding the supply consumption process (Optional)
		"h_loss_cause_uuid": str, 				# The UUID of the cause for the consumption of these supplies, if any (Optional)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 	# Based on the species and production stage which consumed the supply (Optional)
		"gender": GroupGender, 	 				# Whether the gender of the animal's are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Optional)
		"postpone_process": bool 				# If the event's processing should be postponed or not (Optional)
	}
}
